scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=false loads entries normally without setting system properties
scenarios.precondition: Create temporary directory with .env file containing two lines: KEY1=VALUE1 and KEY2=VALUE2; use real DotenvReader and DotenvParser; builder configured with default systemProperties=false
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv instance containing entries with keys KEY1, KEY2 and respective values VALUE1, VALUE2; System.getProperty for KEY1 and KEY2 remains unchanged

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true and empty .env yields no system properties set
scenarios.precondition: Create temp directory with empty .env file; builder configured with systemProperties=true
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv instance with no entries from file; no new System.getProperty keys introduced for any file entries
pseudocode: TEST TC02 load with systemProperties and empty file

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true and one entry sets exactly one system property
scenarios.precondition: Create temp directory with .env file containing a single line: FOO=bar; builder.systemProperties=true
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv instance with entry FOO=bar; System.getProperty("FOO").equals("bar")
pseudocode: TEST TC03 load with one entry and systemProperties

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true and multiple entries sets multiple system properties
scenarios.precondition: Create temp directory with .env file containing lines A=1, B=2, C=3; builder.systemProperties=true
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Dotenv instance with entries A=1, B=2, C=3; System.getProperty("A").equals("1"), System.getProperty("B").equals("2"), System.getProperty("C").equals("3")
pseudocode: TEST TC04 load with multiple entries and systemProperties

scenarios.description: load() throws DotenvException when .env file is missing and throwIfMissing=true
scenarios.precondition: Ensure directory does not contain .env; builder with default throwIfMissing=true
scenarios.expectedResult: throws DotenvException; no System properties modified
pseudocode: TEST TC05 load missing file exception
